title: anthyllis vulneraria f. rubra
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria f. rubra, commonly known as the red kidney vetch, is a flowering plant of the legume family native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of red kidney vetch include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional herbal medicine.
